Headline: Blue Line Service Delayed near Cumberland
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are standing near Cumberland due to a track condition. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are standing near Cumberland due to a track condition.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

  • As a result of the delay, shuttle buses are requested to provide connecting service between O'Hare and Jefferson Park, in both directions.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
